questions.question: Explain why accuracy is misleading for imbalanced datasets
keyPoints: High majority class can inflate scores
Example: 95% negative class gives 95% accuracy with dumb classifier

questions.question: Differentiate between micro and macro averaging in F1-score
keyPoints: Micro favors frequent classes, macro treats classes equally

questions.question: Compare ROC-AUC and Precision-Recall curves. When would you prefer each?
keyPoints: ROC: Balanced class distribution, visualize TPR/FPR tradeoff
PR: Imbalanced data, focus on positive class performance
ROC insensitive to class skew, PR shows practical utility
